middleware.description: Resolves the caller's active Event when a route depends on one. Reads `X-Event-Id` header when the caller's active tenant has a matching Event on that slug or ULID AND the Event is not archived. Sets `Request::activeEvent()` + writes to `RequestContext.event_id` slot. Runs AFTER `season.resolve_active`.

responses.condition: X-Event-Id header points at an Event in a different tenant
responses.description: Security-relevant. Logged with tenant + user + attempted event + IP.

responses.condition: X-Event-Id header points at an archived Event

responses.description: Middleware sets Request::activeEvent() = null and lets the request proceed. Route-level logic decides whether an active event is required.

middleware.description: Guards registration-adjacent write routes (Wave 3+ athlete-enrollment for events surface). Refuses when Event.status is not in a registration-accepting state. Not auto-applied — Wave 3 enrollment routes attach it explicitly.

responses.condition: Request::activeEvent() is null AND route requires one

responses.description: Response includes registration_opens_at + registration_closes_at as hints.

responses.condition: now() > event.registration_closes_at AND (allow_late_registration=false OR the cooling-off cache marker is present)
In late window AND caller lacks `events.enroll.late` permission
